thread.title: Mayors in France want to rip up a key border deal with Britain as they say it is soft on illegal migration
thread.title_full: Mayors in France want to rip up a key border deal with Britain as they say it is soft on illegal migration

author: The Sun
title: Mayors in France want to rip up a key border deal with Britain as they say it is soft on illegal migration
text:
Sport PressBee .. The Sun Watch the post from Mayors in France want to rip up a key border deal with Britain as they say it is soft on illegal migration, Now to the details
Getty MAYORS in France want to rip up a key border deal with Britain as they say it is soft on illegal migration. The 14-strong Opal Coast group accused UK politicians of making noises about stopping boats but not doing enough to deter them. Calais mayor Natacha Bouchart said: “People talk of a border but in fact it doesn’t exist because the British authorities accept all the migrants who arrive. Enough is enough.” The local leaders want Paris to renegotiate the 2003 Le Touquet Treaty that allows UK and French officials to be in the other nation’s port. The idea is that if no UK officials are in Calais, migrants could cross the Channel without needing gangs, with Fran
